text.title: AI Research Tool Categories Taxonomy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the team already aligned on a research tool stack?

conclusion.verdict: Use existing stack; reload taxonomy only on major scope change.
Skip taxonomy; go directly to tool selection.

branch.when: alignment == false AND single_shot_question == false AND corpus_bias_understood == false

conclusion.verdict: Build the four-category map with corpus bias before selection.

branch.when: alignment == false AND single_shot_question == false AND corpus_bias_understood == true

conclusion.verdict: Apply category-first selection; pick product within category.

example.trace: alignment=false → single_shot=false → corpus_bias_understood=false → build taxonomy first.
